name: set_skybox
description: Set the scene's skybox material in the Lighting environment settings. Pass an empty or null material_path to remove the skybox (set to none). Pass a path relative to the Assets folder to set a specific skybox material.

material_path.description: Path to the skybox material relative to the Assets folder, e.g. 'Materials/MySkybox.mat'. Use an empty string or omit to set the skybox to none.
